text.title: Quality Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the quality-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: measurable_thresholds
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Quality standards must be numeric + testable (e.g., 'p95 < 300ms') — never adjective-only ('fast', 'reliable').
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `measurable-thresholds` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: dod_binary
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Definition of Done must be a binary checklist; 'mostly done' is not done.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `dod-binary` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: gate_deterministic
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Quality gate output must be deterministic (same input → same pass/fail) — judgement gates are not gates.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `gate-deterministic` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: severity_priority_separate
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Defect severity (impact on system) must be distinguished from priority (fix order); never collapsed.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `severity-priority-separate` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: cost_of_quality_tracked
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Cost of Conformance vs Non-Conformance must be tracked per release for retrospective.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `cost-of-quality-tracked` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-quality-management.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
